sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ دَوَاءٍ لِلسُّعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u apoteku da kupi lijek protiv kašlja.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to the pharmacy to buy cough medicine.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الْمَرِيضُ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ الْمَوْجُودَةَ عَلَى الْعُلْبَةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pacijent je pažljivo pročitao uputstva na kutiji.
sentences.translationEn: The patient read the instructions on the box carefully.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمَ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ نَصَائِحَ هَامَّةً حَوْلَ مَوَاعِيدِ الْجُرْعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut je dao važne savjete o terminima uzimanja doza.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist provided important advice regarding dose timings.
